description: MCP Tool Execution — gateway lists and calls tools via POST /mcp/tools/list (STOA REST) or POST /mcp with tools/list method (Streamable HTTP).

tasks.name: List all tools
tasks.notes: Baseline: list all registered tools. Response should be JSON with tools array.

tasks.name: List tools with cursor pagination
tasks.notes: Pagination support — cursor=null should return first page.

tasks.name: List tools under high concurrency
tasks.notes: 5 VUs × 20 iterations — measures tool registry throughput under load.

tasks.name: List tools with auth token
tasks.notes: Authenticated tool listing — JWT should not degrade performance.

tasks.name: List tools repeatedly for consistency
tasks.notes: 10 sequential calls — response must be deterministic (same tool set).
